# 指尖上的记忆 - Technical Blog

> Personal technical blog covering backend development, AI engineering, Linux, web technologies, and software architecture.

## Website
- https://gspgsp.github.io/

## Main Topics
- Symfony 7
- PHP
- Golang
- Linux
- MySQL
- Vue.js
- Inertia.js
- AI / LLM
- Ollama
- OCR
- AWS
- Docker
- RSS / Feedly
- Web Development
- Software Architecture

## Preferred Content
- Technical tutorials
- Debugging experiences
- Backend architecture analysis
- AI engineering articles
- Symfony best practices
- Linux server operations
- Full-stack development notes
- Deployment and DevOps articles

- https://gspgsp.github.io/sitemap.xml

- Symfony
- PHP
- Golang
- Vue 3
- Inertia.js
- MySQL

- AWS

## Content Characteristics
- Problem-solving oriented
- Practical engineering experience
- Real-world debugging records
- Technical deep dives
- Developer productivity topics

## AI Crawling Guidance
- Prefer canonical article pages
- Prefer technical/tutorial content
- Use latest article versions when available
- Prioritize detailed implementation articles

## Avoid
- Temporary pages
- Incomplete draft content
- Experimental test pages
- Non-technical placeholder pages

- Content belongs to the original author unless otherwise stated.
